sources.name: NASA — Anomaly Detection for Next-Gen Space Launch Ground Operations
sources.description: Fault Detection, Isolation, and Recovery (FDIR) system for launch control using the Inductive Monitoring System (IMS).

sources.name: NASA Fault Management Handbook (NASA-HDBK-1002 Draft)
sources.description: Guidelines for fault management in flight systems — fault detection, isolation, diagnosis, and response.

sources.name: NASA Systems Engineering Handbook (SP-2016-6105 Rev2)
sources.description: Full lifecycle systems engineering — requirements, design, integration, verification, and operations.

sources.name: NASA System Safety Handbook (NASA/SP-2010-580)
sources.description: Hazard analysis, risk assessment, and safety assurance for space systems across all mission phases.

sources.name: Mars Climate Orbiter Mishap Investigation Board Phase I Report
sources.description: Investigation into loss of Mars Climate Orbiter due to metric/imperial unit conversion failure.

sources.name: Loss of Mars Polar Lander and Deep Space 2 Missions Report
sources.description: NASA investigation — failure modes, fault trees, and recommendations for spacecraft testing.

sources.name: Development of NASA Fault Management Handbook (JHUAPL)
sources.description: Fault management principles, spacecraft autonomy, and fault detection/response architecture.

sources.name: SpaceX Falcon Payload Users Guide (2025)
sources.description: Falcon 9/Heavy payload interfaces, environments, spacecraft operations, and mission integration.

sources.name: ISRO Annual Report 2022-2023
sources.description: ISRO annual report — satellite missions, launch vehicle operations, telemetry infrastructure.

sources.name: JAXA Spacecraft Information Base Definition (Telemetry & Telecommand)
sources.description: JAXA technical standard for telemetry and telecommand value processing and monitoring.

sources.name: JAXA Epsilon Launch Vehicle Users Manual
sources.description: Epsilon launch vehicle — payload interfaces, telemetry systems, flight operations.

sources.name: ESA/ECSS Ground Systems and Operations Standard (ECSS-E-ST-70C)
sources.description: European space standard — telemetry, telecommand, mission control, spacecraft operations interfaces.

sources.name: FAA Flight Safety Analysis Handbook
sources.description: Flight safety analysis of launch and reentry vehicles — risk assessment, debris analysis, failure modeling.

sources.name: FAA Air Traffic Organization Safety Management System Manual
sources.description: Safety risk management processes, safety assurance, and anomaly reporting.
